oath_tactics.name: Red Pursuit
oath_tactics.rules_text: When Tactical Mark is applied, Rowan's next attack gains +2 damage.

oath_tactics.name: First Blood
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first marked enemy each combat takes 3 extra damage.

oath_tactics.name: Spear Line
oath_tactics.rules_text: Rowan prioritizes marked enemies and adds 1 Mark on hit.

oath_tactics.name: Second Cut
oath_tactics.rules_text: After two cards are played in a turn, Sera's next hit gains +3 damage.

oath_tactics.name: Smoke Step
oath_tactics.rules_text: At combat start, gain 1 temporary block for each card in hand.

oath_tactics.name: Quick Claim
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first 0-cost card each combat applies 1 Tactical Mark.

oath_tactics.name: Shared Guard
oath_tactics.rules_text: After you gain block from a card, Eldric stores 2 guard.

oath_tactics.name: Oathwall
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first enemy attack each combat is reduced by 2.

oath_tactics.name: Last Stand
oath_tactics.rules_text: If HP is below 40%, Eldric's guard cards gain +2 block.

oath_tactics.name: Blood Wager
oath_tactics.rules_text: After you lose HP by card effect, Bram gains +2 damage this combat.

oath_tactics.name: Hard Bargain
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first self-damage card each combat refunds 1 energy.

oath_tactics.name: Red Laugh
oath_tactics.rules_text: When an enemy is defeated, heal 2.

oath_tactics.name: No Free Debt
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first heal each combat costs 1 less but applies 1 Weak to you next turn.

oath_tactics.name: Clean Bandage
oath_tactics.rules_text: After a perfect block turn, heal 1.
